ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-11-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL WAS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A). PLAINTIFF INDICATED THAT THE CASE IS AT-ISSUE. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/17/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 7/07/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. FILMS TO BE PROVIDED TO BERRY & BERRY BY 4/25/06. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 5/19/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE, BY FAX, AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL #2542 (206)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR PREFERENCD EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUT-OFF

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Aurelio Sanchez's motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable of defendant Leslie Controls Incorporated is granted. No opposition has been filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed by August 7, 2006.
